message:
feat(runtime): comprehensive runtime subsystem improvements

This commit delivers a major overhaul across the async runtime,
focusing on type safety, resource management, and HTTP/2 handling.

## TokenSlab Migration (IO Driver)
- Replace raw `Slab<Waker>` with type-safe `TokenSlab` wrapper
- Introduce `SlabToken` type for compile-time token safety
- Update register_waker to return proper Token instead of raw usize
- Ensures waker slot indices are always correctly typed

## Scheduler Enhancements (three_lane)
- Add +351/-15 lines of improvements to the three-lane scheduler
- Better task prioritization and load balancing
- Enhanced metrics collection for scheduling decisions

## HTTP/2 Connection Handling
- Refactor connection state machine (+243/-150 lines)
- Improve stream lifecycle management (+63 lines)
- Better flow control and window management

## TLS Layer Improvements
- Acceptor: Add +132 lines for connection buffering
- Connector: Add +98 lines for handshake optimization
- New error variants for TLS-specific failure modes

## Time Driver Overhaul
- Major expansion +176 lines for hierarchical timing wheel
- Enhanced sleep future implementation (+117 lines)
- Better deadline coalescing for reduced wakeups

## Service Middleware
- Rate limiting: Add +100 lines for token bucket with bursting
- Timeout: Add +94 lines for deadline propagation

## Unix Socket Handling
- Streamline listener implementation (-40 lines, cleaner API)
- Improve split read/write handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
